notes: Level 7 manual review override shard for final spell index 25 in generated discovery row order.
This packet added structured/runtime mechanics for Whirlwind's moving area, object suction, restraint, forced vertical movement, falling, and escape hurl.

whirlwind::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Dexterity damage save and Strength restraint save are represented by effects, but runtime lacks a first-class two-step save chain where the second save only occurs for Large-or-smaller creatures that failed the first save.
whirlwind::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add chained save and size-gated secondary save fields.
whirlwind::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime chainedSave data keyed to failed primary save and target size.

whirlwind::target_filter_or_eligibility.issue: Medium-or-smaller unsecured unworn/un-carried object suction and Large-or-smaller creature restraint are preserved in utility/effects, but runtime lacks typed object security/worn-carried and size-gated rider fields.
whirlwind::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object security/worn-carried and size-gated rider fields.
whirlwind::target_filter_or_eligibility.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime objectSuctionFilter and sizeGatedRider data.

whirlwind::sustain_or_recast_action.issue: The caster action to move the whirlwind up to 30 feet is represented as a MOVEMENT effect with on_caster_action trigger and utility option.
whirlwind::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional sustain field required for this pass.
whirlwind::sustain_or_recast_action.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by MOVEMENT trigger and UTILITY controlOptions.

whirlwind::forced_movement.issue: Upward pull, carried movement with the whirlwind, fall on end, and escape hurl are represented by MOVEMENT effects and utility options.
whirlwind::forced_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional forced movement field required for this pass.
whirlwind::forced_movement.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by MOVEMENT effects and UTILITY controlOptions.

whirlwind::terrain_or_surface.issue: The visible ground point and cylinder area are represented by targeting.areaOfEffect and utility options.

whirlwind::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched visible point targeting and howling flavor; the targeting visibility is represented and the sound is descriptive flavor with no runtime rule beyond spell presence.
whirlwind::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by targeting.lineOfSight; no sound runtime data required.

whirlwind::healing_or_restoration.issue: The detector matched 'successful' save text, not healing or restoration.

whirlwind::status_or_state_change.issue: Restrained is represented as a STATUS_CONDITION effect with break/end context.
whirlwind::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional status field required for this pass.

whirlwind::environmental_change.issue: Whirlwind object suction and moving cylinder control are represented by movement/utility data, but runtime lacks first-class mobile hazard/object pickup fields.
whirlwind::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add mobile hazard and object pickup fields.
whirlwind::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime mobileHazard and objectPickup data.

whirlwind::conditional_ending.issue: Falls when the spell ends and restraint ending on successful escape are represented by MOVEMENT, STATUS_CONDITION, and utility options.
whirlwind::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional conditional-ending field required for this pass.

whirlwind::aftermath_or_memory.issue: The detector matched the fall-on-end aftermath; this is represented as movement rather than a memory/aftermath mechanic.
